title: How to speak powerfully in the age of AI | Louise Beale | TEDxNorthampton
reasoning: As a junior fullstack engineer, technical skills are only half the battle. This talk offers essential communication frameworks to help you articulate your value and stand out in an industry increasingly dominated by AI automation.
summary: In an era where AI can generate code, your human ability to communicate with impact is your ultimate competitive edge. Learn how to speak with authority, make your ideas heard, and command influence as an early-career professional.

title: Evil Is Not Loud  / Kötülük Gürültülü Değil | Kevser Çimenli | TEDxAlsancak Salon
reasoning: This talk is highly philosophical and largely targeted at a regional Turkish audience, offering little to no actionable advice for software engineering, career growth, or Islamic finance.

title: The Era of the Noise / Gürültü Çağı | F.Kaan Bayhan | TEDxAlsancak Salon
reasoning: While conceptually interesting, this philosophical discussion on 'noise' lacks the practical career frameworks or industry relevance required to benefit a junior fullstack developer.
